THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITAKER, PATRICIA RICHARDSON, DENNIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: MISSION HOTEL, 520 S. VAN NESS AVE, #316, STAYED UNTIL APR-09-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT OF $1825.00 WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH ALL OBLIGATIONS AND VACATES THE UNIT, ETC. & TURNS OVER ALL KEYS TO PLTF, PRIOR TO EXPIRATION DATE OF THE STAY; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAIL).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
